title: Chunilla
description: A minecraft PBR vanilla texture pack !
body:
![Deepslate diamond ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c5fadf939abdace763390922051310dfb5f383.png)

### This is a WIP texture pack and will be update for more blocks in the future!

You can feedback in my **discord**. Much appreciate!

You wanted a PBR texture pack but still keep the vanilla look? Please try my texture pack, it based on vanilla texture pack and gameplay friendly.

There will be pbr support for some mods in the future. You can join my **discord** to track my progress!

Recommend shader:
- Bliss
- Nostalgia (VX)

_make sure you turned on the **POM** and **Reflection**_

> Check gallery for screenshots :)

-------------------------------------------
You can do whatever you want with the pack.

But please do not claim it as yours!
